top_findings.summary: The skill description mentions a "confidence scoring system" and "Match API" that provides semantic matching for artifact recommendations. While the API is described as running locally, the documentation indicates it may rely on an external "Embedding service" (potentially requiring ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) to process user queries. Sending user queries—which could contain project details or sensitive context—to an external service without explicit disclosure and consent in the main skill description constitutes a privacy risk. The fallback to local keyword search mitigates this, but the lack of clear upfront disclosure about potential external data transmission is concerning.
